name: ParticleFXEmitter
shortDescription: Advanced 2D & 3D particle system with keyframe animations, supporting Shape Painter and 3D scenes.

eventsBasedObjects.description: Display particles with Particles FX Editor.
eventsBasedObjects.name: ParticleFXEmitter3D

eventsFunctions.name: LayerName
eventsFunctions.description: the layer name of the object. Layer name for 3D rendering (empty = default layer)

eventsFunctions.name: ShouldAutodestruct
eventsFunctions.description: Check if delete when emission ends. This is destroyed when the particle flow ends

eventsFunctions.name: SetShouldAutodestruct
eventsFunctions.description: Change if delete when emission ends. This is destroyed when the particle flow ends

eventsFunctions.name: Flow
eventsFunctions.description: the flow of the object. Emission flow in particles/sec (-1 = use JSON)

eventsFunctions.name: EmissionMode
eventsFunctions.description: the emissionMode of the object. Override: json, infinite, burst, finite

eventsFunctions.name: ResetEffect
eventsFunctions.description: Check if reset effect. Clears all particles and restarts

eventsFunctions.name: SetResetEffect
eventsFunctions.description: Change if reset effect. Clears all particles and restarts

eventsFunctions.name: Spread
eventsFunctions.description: the cone diffision of the object. Cone spread override (-1 = use JSON)

eventsFunctions.name: DirectionZ
eventsFunctions.description: the z direction emission of the object. Cone directionZ override (-1 = use JSON)

eventsFunctions.name: DirectionY
eventsFunctions.description: the y direction emission of the object. Cone directionY override (-1 = use JSON)

eventsFunctions.name: ShowCone
eventsFunctions.description: Check if showCone. Show cone of diffusion wireframe guide (editor + runtime)

eventsFunctions.name: SetShowCone
eventsFunctions.description: Change if showCone. Show cone of diffusion wireframe guide (editor + runtime)

eventsFunctions.name: ShowZone
eventsFunctions.description: Check if showZone. Show spawn zone wireframe guide (editor + runtime)

eventsFunctions.name: SetShowZone
eventsFunctions.description: Change if showZone. Show spawn zone wireframe guide (editor + runtime)

eventsFunctions.name: SpeedMultiplier
eventsFunctions.description: the speed of the object. Global speed multiplier

eventsFunctions.name: SizeMultiplier
eventsFunctions.description: the size of the object. Global size multiplier

eventsFunctions.name: OpacityMultiplier
eventsFunctions.description: the opacity of the object. Global opacity multiplier

description:
## Overview
Complete particle system for GDevelop with **2D** (custom 2D object) and **3D** (custom 3D object) support. Design effects in the GDParticleFX Editor and import them via JSON.

## Features
- **Multiple emission modes**: infinite, burst, finite (reservoir)
- **Spawn zones**: point, circle, rectangle, line (2D) — sphere, box, line (3D)
- **Directional cone** with spread, rotation, and elevation (3D)
- **Per-keyframe easing**: linear, easeIn, easeOut, easeInOut
- **Particle shapes**: circle, square, triangle, star, diamond, line, custom SVG
- **3D shapes**: sphere, cube, diamond, billboard, custom GLB models, textured images
- **Runtime overrides**: flow, direction, spread, speed/size/opacity multipliers
- **Gravity** and **align to velocity** support
- **Visual debug guides** for cone and spawn zone
- **Reverse mode**: particles converge toward the emitter

## 2D — Custom Object
Works on any 2D layer. Supports Simple SVG, PixiJS Sprite rendered with PixiJS.

## 3D — Custom Object
Works on any 3D layer. Supports GLB models, textured billboards, and 3D primitives rendered with Three.js.

## Use Cases
- Explosions, fire, smoke, sparks, magic effects
- Rain, snow, confetti, bubbles, ambient particles
- Trail effects, UI highlights, celebrations
- 3D volumetric effects and model-based particles

## How to Use
1. Export your effect as JSON from GDParticleFX Editor
2. **2D**: Add the 2D emitter object to a D layer
3. **3D**: Add the 3D emitter object to a 3D layer
4. Set the ParticleJSON property — effect plays automatically!
